hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mts) pnpm oxfmt --write "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mts) OUTPUT=$(pnpm oxlint "$f" 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ] || echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -q 'Found [1-9]'; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"oxlint output for $f:\n$OUTPUT\"}}"; fi ;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.mts) OUTPUT=$(pnpm --filter rozenite-growthbook-plugin typecheck 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"TypeScript errors:\n$OUTPUT\"}}"; fi ;; esac; }
